description.value: Create permanent wall of stone at medium range up to 60 feet long, 20 feet high, 6 inches thick (or 30 feet long and 1 foot thick). Each 10ft section has HP = 16 + Earth Potential, DR 8. Can shape into crenellations, bridges, etc.

system.range: Medium, 60 ft. (60 feet long, 20 feet high)
system.effect: Create permanent wall of stone at medium range up to 60 feet long, 20 feet high, 6 inches thick (or 30 feet long and 1 foot thick). Each 10ft section has HP = 16 + Earth Potential, DR 8. Can shape into crenellations, bridges, etc.
system.weavingRoll: Earth Potential + Earth Mastery / Space Potential + Space Mastery
